function.message: Looks promising, but the current draft still smells like elegant consulting instinct, not a hard product boundary.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap sequence (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, resolved identity via canonical cast record, then read every channel transcript fully.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity is Tobias Kern per 10_entities/cast/tobias.md. After exhaustive read of all transcripts in 60_outbox/channels, only northstar_email contains a message authored by Tobias Kern (author_id entity.tobias), so that is the last recorded message from Kern Tobias.
